# Contributing to Guardrail.ai Community Edition

Thank you for your interest in contributing! Guardrail.ai relies on the community to build a safe, robust open-source governance layer.

## Quick Links
- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [Issue Templates](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/)
- [Developer Hub](../docs/index.md)

## How to Contribute

### 1. Find an Issue
Look for issues tagged with `good first issue` or `help wanted`.

### 2. Fork and Clone
Fork the repository and clone it locally. 
Run `pip install -r requirements.txt` and ensure `pytest` passes locally.

### 3. Create a Branch
Use a descriptive branch name: `feature/your-feature-name` or `bugfix/issue-description`.

### 4. Submit a Pull Request
Fill out the Pull Request Template completely. Ensure all tests pass.

## Enterprise Features
Note: Code specifically impacting enterprise endpoints (e.g., `app/redteam`, `app/insurance`) will undergo additional scrutiny by the core maintainers.
